details.quote: we may automatically log your activity on web, emails, or advertising and marketing servers we control through cookies (small information files placed on a hard drive), web beacons, tracking pixels, browser configuration details (e.g. browser type, list of installed plugins and list of installed fonts), and embedded scripts (programming code that is temporarily downloaded onto a device)
details.what_is_tracked: activity on web, emails, or advertising and marketing servers

mentions_legales.label: Dénomination sociale (nom/raison sociale)
mentions_legales.quote: Sony Interactive Entertainment Europe Limited and its wholly owned subsidiaries Sony Interactive Entertainment Network Europe Limited and Sony Interactive Entertainment Direct Europe Limited

mentions_legales.label: Forme juridique
mentions_legales.quote: registered in England under company numbers: 03277793, 06020283, and 03754597

mentions_legales.label: Adresse de l'établissement / siège social
mentions_legales.quote: 10 Great Marlborough Street, London, United Kingdom, W1F 7LP

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Présence d'une politique de confidentialité
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: This Privacy Policy explains when we collect information about you, including Personal Information (“PI”), what we collect, why we collect it, how we use it, who we share it with, where it is processed, how we handle it and your choices and legal rights associated with this information.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Identité du Responsable de Traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Sony Interactive Entertainment Europe Limited and its wholly owned subsidiaries Sony Interactive Entertainment Network Europe Limited and Sony Interactive Entertainment Direct Europe Limited (in countries in which PlayStation Direct is available) ("SIE", “we,” “our,” and “us") controls the information collected when you interact with PlayStation through our websites, products, services, or other online activities (“Services”).

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Coordonnées du DPO
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: You can also contact our Data Protection Officer via email at siee.dpo@sony.com.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Types de données collectées + raison
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Contact information (e.g. name, email or physical address, country, or phone number); Account Administration information (e.g. user name, password, or security questions); Billing information (e.g. credit card or other payment number, billing address); Date of Birth; and Profile information (e.g. profile photo, languages, likes)

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Base légale du traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We will only use your PI for certain specified reasons and only where we have a lawful basis to do so. The lawful bases we rely on depend on the type of relationship we have with you and how we interact with you. Further details about the purposes on which we process your PI under these lawful bases are set out in the sections for Information that We Collect of Receive, Information Use, Information Sharing and Transfers. These purposes include the following: ● Contract – to provide our products and services to you and fulfil our contractual relationship with you. ● Legitimate Interests – to fulfil our legitimate interests, or those of a third party in conducting and managing our business and our relationship with you as described in this Privacy Policy. ● Legal obligation – to meet our legal obligations under applicable law, including to comply with financial reporting requirements. ● Consent – where you have provided us consent to process your PI for a specific purpose.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Caractère obligatoire/facultatif + conséquences
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Please make sure that any personal details which you provide are accurate and current. We will send any important information relating to your Account to you using the contact information you provide (including Account security and privacy notices).

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Durée de conservation des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We may retain information about you as long as it is necessary for us to fulfil the purposes outlined in this Privacy Policy. In addition, we may retain your information for an additional period as is permitted or required to, among other things, comply with our legal obligations, resolve disputes, and enforce agreements.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Destinataires des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We may share your information with the following recipients and for the following purposes: Service Providers, Partners, Other Users, Government & Authorities

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Sécurité des données (art. 32 RGPD)
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We seek to maintain appropriate technical and organisational security measures that conform to industry standards to help protect your information against unauthorised or accidental disclosure, access, misuse, loss, or alteration.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Collecte indirecte : catégories concernées
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We may receive information, including the following, from third party sources and combine it with information we already directly collect from you.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Collecte indirecte : source des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Game, social media, or other information, from those third parties or services you link your Account with, or who provide information to power PlayStation features.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'introduire une plainte (CNIL)
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: If however you feel we have not dealt with your concern and/or that we are failing to meet our legal obligations, you can report this to your local data protection regulator or the Information Commissioner's Office ("ICO") in the United Kingdom.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit de rectification
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Right of rectification: You have the right to rectify your information, restrict processing, and object to the use of your PI in some circumstances as defined by law.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'accès
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Right of Access and Portability: You have the right to request certain information about the processing of your PI and to be provided with a copy of your PI.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à l'effacement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Right of Erasure: You have the right to request that we delete the PI we have collected or retained about you in some circumstances as defined by law.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à la limitation du traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Right to Restrict: You have the right to restrict the processing of your PI in certain circumstances.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à la portabilité
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Right of Access and Portability: You have the right to request certain information about the processing of your PI and to be provided with a copy of your PI.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'opposition
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Right to Object: You have the right to object to the processing of your PI in certain circumstances.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Date de dernière mise à jour de la politique

cookies.label: Retrait du consentement simple et à tout moment
Information sur le Responsable de Traitement
Détail des types de cookies déposés

transferts_hors_ue.label: Existence de transferts hors UE + destinataires
transferts_hors_ue.quote: Our Services are operated in the United States, United Kingdom, Japan, and other countries/areas/regions around the world. Please be aware that information we collect, including PI, will be transferred to, processed and stored in these countries/areas/regions

transferts_hors_ue.label: Stockage cloud hors UE + localisation serveurs

identite.quote: Contact information (e.g. name, email or physical address, country, or phone number); Date of Birth; and Profile information (e.g. profile photo, languages, likes)
identite.purpose: Création de compte, gestion du profil et communication avec l'utilisateur.

contact.quote: Contact information (e.g. name, email or physical address, country, or phone number); phone number
contact.purpose: Communication, support technique et gestion du compte.

compte_auth.quote: Account Administration information (e.g. user name, password, or security questions); Account authentication tokens that avoid you having to log in repeatedly
compte_auth.purpose: Authentification et gestion sécurisée du compte utilisateur.

paiement.quote: Billing information (e.g. credit card or other payment number, billing address); Card account update information provided by your bank to help keep your payment cards up to date on your Account
paiement.purpose: Traitement des paiements et gestion des achats.

localisation.purpose: Personnalisation des services et affichage de contenu pertinent.

appareil_technique.quote: Device identifiers such as your PlayStation console ID, mobile device IDs, cookie IDs, or serial numbers. Network identifiers such as your IP address and MAC address. Information about the device you are using, any connected peripherals (such as controllers and VR headsets) and how you have configured them
appareil_technique.purpose: Identification de l'appareil, personnalisation et amélioration des services.

usage_comportement.quote: Information about how you use the software installed on your device (which may include information about the use of the software offline), such as date and time of use, what games or music you play, what content you browse, share or download, what services you access and for how long, including how often you use chat and other communication applications. The actions you take within games or apps published by SIE (e.g. what obstacle you jump over and what levels you reach). Software errors and load times details, and if you have the 'Report System Software Errors Automatically' setting turned on, detailed information about the crash, including screenshots and video captured before the crash
usage_comportement.purpose: Analyse de l'usage des services, amélioration des produits et support technique.

contenus_utilisateur.quote: when you want to post in a blog, you provide us the content for the blog post (which could contain PI which we collect and then display for you on the blog). Likewise, when you use other features such as voice or text messaging, blogs, surveys, user-generated content, activity streams, or social media, we may first collect the information you enter into the feature
contenus_utilisateur.purpose: Gestion des contenus créés par l'utilisateur (blogs, messages, etc.).

communications.quote: We may also record calls you make to PlayStation Support. text chat, voice chat, video chat, and other messaging features
communications.purpose: Support technique, modération et gestion des communications entre utilisateurs.

contacts_reseau.quote: Information from other users, for example if those users have given us access to their profiles and if you are one of their connections, or information about you is otherwise made accessible to us by them
contacts_reseau.purpose: Gestion des connexions sociales et partage d'informations entre utilisateurs.

donnees_tiers.quote: We may receive information, including the following, from third party sources and combine it with information we already directly collect from you. Game, social media, or other information, from those third parties or services you link your Account with, or who provide information to power PlayStation features. Information from third parties as appropriate given our relationship, for example from anti-fraud service providers we might obtain fraud risk scores; from law enforcement or partners, we might obtain IP addresses and details of suspected unlawful or malicious activity
donnees_tiers.purpose: Enrichissement des données utilisateur via des partenaires et tiers (réseaux sociaux, anti-fraude, etc.).

mineurs.quote: Accounts for children between the age of 7 to 17 years old, must be created by your parent or legal guardian ("Responsible Adult"). If you are creating an account for your child, we recommend that you and your child read our Privacy Information for Young Players to help them understand how we handle their PI and their rights over their PI
mineurs.purpose: Gestion des comptes pour mineurs avec contrôle parental.

legal_bases.quote: Contract – to provide our products and services to you and fulfil our contractual relationship with you. For example, when you make a purchase on PlayStation Store, we process your PI to take payment and (if applicable) deliver items to you

legal_bases.data: appareil_technique, usage_comportement, localisation, contenus_utilisateur, communications, contacts_reseau, donnees_tiers
legal_bases.quote: Legitimate Interests – to fulfil our legitimate interests, or those of a third party in conducting and managing our business and our relationship with you as described in this Privacy Policy. For example, we rely on legitimate interest to (a) detect and prevent fraud, the unauthorised use of our Services, and other harmful or illegal activity, including by reviewing reports submitted by other PlayStation users, (b) improve our products and services, including by performing analytics and business reporting in relation to how you use our Services and any issues you may encounter, and (c) share information with other Sony Group Corporation companies where necessary to support the security of our Services
Legal obligation – to meet our legal obligations under applicable law, including to comply with financial reporting requirements
Consent – where you have provided us consent to process your PI for a specific purpose. including to send marketing messages and personalised advertisements to you

transfers.quote: Our Services are operated in the United States, United Kingdom, Japan, and other countries/areas/regions around the world. Please be aware that information we collect, including PI, will be transferred to, processed and stored in these countries/areas/regions
